page_metadata.biotools__summary: Matlab toolbox with graphical interface to analysis DNA microarray-based comparative genomic hybridization (CGH) experiments. CGH on DNA microarray enable us to measure the copy numbers of thousands of genes through the genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Matlab toolbox with graphical interface to analysis DNA microarray-based comparative genomic hybridization (CGH) experiments. CGH on DNA microarray enable us to measure the copy numbers of thousands of genes through the genome.
